identity.name: BursaryFlow Enterprise
identity.core_philosophy: Professional clarity meets human warmth. Data-heavy but breathable.
anti_patterns: No default 20px margins - use 32px+ for breathing room.

rules: Headings must be 'Manrope'. Import it in index.css.
Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px.
Never use pure black (#000000) for text. Use Slate-900 (#0f172a).

usage_rules: Primary Blue (#0056B3) is for Primary Actions and Active States ONLY.
Sidebar background should be White (#FFFFFF) or very pale Slate (#F8FAFC) to keep it clean.
Use 'Slate' scale for neutrals, not 'Gray' or 'Zinc' to maintain a cool, professional tone.
Success/Error colors must be muted, not neon. (e.g., text-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50).

cards.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#0056B3] hover:bg-[#004494] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

inputs.style: rounded-md border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#0056B3] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-white/20 (Use for Sticky Header only)
visual_enhancers.gradients: No background gradients. Use subtle mesh gradients only for 'Premium' or 'AI' feature cards if absolutely necessary.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'phosphor-icons' (Duotone) for Feature Cards if available.

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is Slate-600 or darker on white backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (#0056B3).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have 'data-testid' attributes.

setup: Configure Tailwind theme to match the 'colors' section exactly.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar and Header structure.
critical_rules: DO NOT use 'lorem ipsum'. Use realistic data (e.g., 'University of Cape Town', 'Engineering Bursary 2025').
DO NOT make the sidebar dark mode by default. Keep it light/white for a clean enterprise look.
Ensure the 'Application Form' has a clear progress indicator (Step 1 of 4).

general: Avoid 'AI slop' - generic, centered, low-contrast designs.
Use 2-3x more spacing than you think is necessary.
Every interaction needs a micro-state (hover, active, focus).
